problem: Why does the immune system attack the body's own tissue in autoimmune disease?
mechanism: mRNA therapy to upregulate/downregulate gene expression
hypothesis: If mRNA therapy to upregulate/downregulate gene expression is applied to in, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 33 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
